prompt: Tap btn as the position anchor before acting.
why_v1: Position anchors keep action order clear before a track-specific action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The button is the right seat anchor, so the cue read stays tied to the player with the positional edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The button is the right position anchor because mixed-game stability depends on knowing which range owns the positional edge before money goes in.
